title: Resolution Approving the Supplemental Investment Program (SIP) for the Supplemental Budget for the Year 2021 in the Amount of Two Million Eight Hundred Thousand Pesos and 00/100 (P 2,800,000.00) to Be Taken From the Personal Services Savings for the Grant of Service Recognition Incentive to Municipal Officials and Employees of the Municipal Government of Los Baños for Fy 2021.
